lectureSummary: Eukaryotic transcription centers on RNA polymerase II, promoter recognition by general transcription factors, and ordered assembly of a pre-initiation complex rather than bacterial sigma-factor logic.
keyConcepts: TFIIH contributes helicase and kinase activity
Pre-initiation complex assembly can be remembered in a simplified order
compareContrast: Bacterial sigma-factor promoter recognition versus eukaryotic general transcription factor assembly
testableFacts: TFIIH is not the same thing as Mediator
misconceptions: Treating Mediator as an enzymatic initiation factor
